$comment: Yarn Spinner project file schema, version 3.
title: Yarn Spinner Project
description: Configuration file for a Yarn Spinner project (.yarnproject)

projectFileVersion.description: The version of the project file format.

sourceFiles.description: Glob patterns specifying which .yarn files to include. Relative to the .yarnproject location.

excludeFiles.description: Glob patterns specifying files to exclude, even if they match sourceFiles.

baseLanguage.description: The language code for the source language of dialogue in .yarn files (e.g. 'en', 'ja', 'zh-Hans').

localisation.description: Maps language codes to their string tables and asset directories for translation.

strings.description: Path to the CSV file containing translated strings.

assets.description: Path to the directory containing localized assets.

definitions.description: Path(s) to .ysls.json definition files for custom commands and functions.

compilerOptions.description: Options that affect compilation. Used by all parts of the Yarn Spinner pipeline.

allowPreviewFeatures.description: If true, enables experimental language features that may change.
